com.github.dakusui.actionunit

Enum Actions

  • java.lang.Object
    • java.lang.Enum<Actions>
      • com.github.dakusui.actionunit.Actions
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Serializable, Comparable<Actions>

    public enum Actions
extends Enum<Actions>
    This class contains static utility methods that return objects of type Action. How objects returned by methods in this class are performed is subject to actual implementations of Action.Visitor interfaces, such as ActionRunner.
    See Also:
    Action, Action.Visitor

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static Action concurrent(Action... actions)
      Creates an action which runs given actions in a concurrent manner.
      static Action concurrent(String summary, Action... actions)
      Creates an action which runs given actions in a concurrent manner.
      static Action concurrent(String summary, Iterable<? extends Action> actions)
      Creates an action which runs given actions in a concurrent manner.
      static <T> Action.WithTarget.Factory<T> forEach(Block<T> block)
      Returns a factory which creates an action to process an object of type T.
      static <T> Action.WithTarget.Factory<T> forEach(String summary, Block<T> block)
      Returns a factory which creates an action to process an object of type T.
      static Action nop()
      Returns an action that does nothing.
      static Action nop(String summary)
      Returns an action that does nothing.
      static <T> Action repeatIncrementally(Iterable<T> datasource, Action.WithTarget.Factory<T> factoryForActionWithTarget)
      Performs an action created by given factoryForActionWithTarget for each element in given datasource.
      static Action retry(Action action, int times, int interval, TimeUnit timeUnit)
      Creates an action which retries given action.
      static Action sequential(Action... actions)
      Creates an action which runs given actions in a sequential manner.
      static Action sequential(String summary, Action... actions)
      Creates an action which runs given actions in a sequential manner.
      static Action sequential(String summary, Iterable<? extends Action> actions)
      Creates an action which runs given actions in a sequential manner.
      static Action simple(Runnable runnable)
      Creates a simple action object.
      static Action simple(String summary, Runnable runnable)
      Creates a simple action object.
      static Action timeout(Action action, int duration, TimeUnit timeUnit)
      Creates an action object which times out after duration specified by given parameters.
      static Actions valueOf(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this type with the specified name.
      static Actions[] values()
      Returns an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Enum

        clone, compareTo, equals, finalize, getDeclaringClass, hashCode, name, ordinal, toString, valueOf

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        getClass, notify, notifyAll, wait, wait, wait

    • Method Detail

      • values

        public static Actions[] values()
        Returns an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared. This method may be used to iterate over the constants as follows: 
        for (Actions c : Actions.values())
    System.out.println(c);
        Returns:
        an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared

      • valueOf

        public static Actions valueOf(String name)
        Returns the enum constant of this type with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this type. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
        Parameters:
        name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
        Returns:
        the enum constant with the specified name
        Throws:
        IllegalArgumentException - if this enum type has no constant with the specified name
        NullPointerException - if the argument is null

      • simple

        public static Action simple(Runnable runnable)
        Creates a simple action object.
        Parameters:
        runnable - An object whose run() method run by a returned Action object.
        See Also:
        Action.Leaf

      • simple

        public static Action simple(String summary,
            Runnable runnable)
        Creates a simple action object.
        Parameters:
        summary - A string used by describe() method of a returned Action object.
        runnable - An object whose run() method run by a returned Action object.
        See Also:
        Action.Leaf

      • concurrent

        public static Action concurrent(Action... actions)
        Creates an action which runs given actions in a concurrent manner.
        Parameters:
        actions - Action objects performed by returned Action object.
        See Also:
        Action.Sequential

      • concurrent

        public static Action concurrent(String summary,
                Action... actions)
        Creates an action which runs given actions in a concurrent manner.
        Parameters:
        summary - A string used by describe() method of a returned Action object.
        actions - Action objects performed by a returned Action object.
        See Also:
        Action.Sequential

      • concurrent

        public static Action concurrent(String summary,
                Iterable<? extends Action> actions)
        Creates an action which runs given actions in a concurrent manner.
        Parameters:
        summary - A string used by describe() method of a returned Action object.
        actions - Action objects performed by returned Action object.
        See Also:
        Action.Sequential

      • sequential

        public static Action sequential(Action... actions)
        Creates an action which runs given actions in a sequential manner.
        Parameters:
        actions - Action objects performed by returned Action object.
        See Also:
        Action.Sequential

      • sequential

        public static Action sequential(String summary,
                Action... actions)
        Creates an action which runs given actions in a sequential manner.
        Parameters:
        summary - A string used by describe() method of a returned Action object.
        actions - Action objects performed by returned Action object.
        See Also:
        Action.Sequential

      • sequential

        public static Action sequential(String summary,
                Iterable<? extends Action> actions)
        Creates an action which runs given actions in a sequential manner.
        Parameters:
        summary - A string used by describe() method of a returned Action object.
        actions - Action objects performed by returned Action object.
        See Also:
        Action.Sequential

      • timeout

        public static Action timeout(Action action,
             int duration,
             TimeUnit timeUnit)
        Creates an action object which times out after duration specified by given parameters.
        Parameters:
        action - An action performed by the returned object.
        duration - A parameter to specify duration to time out with timeUnit parameter.
        timeUnit - Time unit of duration.

      • retry

        public static Action retry(Action action,
           int times,
           int interval,
           TimeUnit timeUnit)
        Creates an action which retries given action.
        Parameters:
        action - An action retried by the returned Action.
        times - How many times given action will be retried. If 0 is given, no retry will happen.
        interval - Interval between actions.
        timeUnit - Time unit of interval.

      • repeatIncrementally

        public static <T> Action repeatIncrementally(Iterable<T> datasource,
                             Action.WithTarget.Factory<T> factoryForActionWithTarget)
        Performs an action created by given factoryForActionWithTarget for each element in given datasource.
        Type Parameters:
        T - Type of entries in datasource.
        Parameters:
        datasource - each of whose elements are processed by an action that factoryForActionWithTarget creates.
        factoryForActionWithTarget - creates an action that processes each element in dataSource.

      • forEach

        public static <T> Action.WithTarget.Factory<T> forEach(Block<T> block)
        Returns a factory which creates an action to process an object of type T.
        Type Parameters:
        T - Type of object processed that an action object processes created by returned factory.
        Parameters:
        block - specifies how to process a given object of type T.
        See Also:
        repeatIncrementally(Iterable, Action.WithTarget.Factory)

      • forEach

        public static <T> Action.WithTarget.Factory<T> forEach(String summary,
                                       Block<T> block)
        Returns a factory which creates an action to process an object of type T.
        Type Parameters:
        T - Type of object processed that an action object processes created by returned factory.
        Parameters:
        summary - A string that describes returned factory. This will also be used to describe an action created by it.
        block - specifies how to process a given object of type T.
        See Also:
        repeatIncrementally(Iterable, Action.WithTarget.Factory)

      • nop

        public static Action nop()
        Returns an action that does nothing.

      • nop

        public static Action nop(String summary)
        Returns an action that does nothing.
        Parameters:
        summary - A string that describes returned action.
